summary: The incident fix restores the website release gate without weakening repository-wide lint or release checks.
findings: Framework-specific filename exceptions are limited to React components, data modules, and Docusaurus theme paths; the generated exclusion is limited to one presentation subtree.
Actionable source findings were corrected and verified by the production site build; the active incident was preserved in the durable archive before canonical and projected registries were cleared.
evidence_refs: bun run lint:website; bun run docs:site:typecheck; bun run docs:site:generate:check; bun run docs:site:build:check
bun run ci:contract; bun run test:fast; node scripts/check-release-incidents.mjs; node .agentplane/policy/check-routing.mjs; ap doctor
residual_risks: Docusaurus build emits non-blocking Node experimental localStorage warnings; no build or runtime failure was observed.
